name: Texas/Ontario Picante Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Jalepeno peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor and chop until desired consistency is reached (less chopped for thicker sauce, more chopped for thinner).
2. Pour the mixture into a large pot and bring to a boil.
3. Allow the sauce to cool enough to pour into pint jars, ensuring the jars are at least 1 inch below the rim of the jar when placed in a canning bracket.
4. Place the jars in water and immerse them so that the water covers about 1 inch below the top of each jar.
5. Bring the water to a boil and process the jars for 20 minutes.
6. Remove from heat, let cool, and serve as a condiment for various dishes, particularly well-suited for Mexican cuisine.
